ふぅ……今日からこちらで働くんですね。<br>聖職者なのに、本当にいいんでしょう:
*sigh*... So I'll be working here starting today. Even though I'm
clergy, is this really okay...?
いえ、皆さんを癒やすために頑張らないと。<br>――ちょっとだけお酒を飲んじゃ…:
No, I have to do my best to heal everyone—just a little drink... That's
not okay, is it...?
ノエミの待機する部屋に、コンコンとノックの音が響く。<br>どうぞ、と声をかける:
A knock echoed through Noemi's waiting room. When she invited him
in, a man appeared.
あ いらっしゃいませ。<br>本日のお客さま、ですよね。: Ah, welcome. You're today's client, right?
お相手をします、ノエミです。<br>あの……大丈夫ですか？: I'm Noemi. I'll be your healer today. Um... are you alright?
（女性を求めて来店するんですから、積極的な方かと思っていたんですが。<br>なん:
(Since he came here seeking a woman, I thought he'd be the assertive
type, but... he seems completely worn out.)
実はちょっとキツい任務があって、もう精神が限界で……<br>なんとか気力を振り絞:
Actually, I had a really tough mission, and I'm at my mental limit... I
barely mustered the willpower to come here.
そんな……！<br>大変な中で来てくれたんですね。:
That's terrible...! You still came, even though you're going through
such a hard time.
（ヒーラーの技術で、身体は癒せても心は癒やせません。<br>でも私は聖職者ですっ:
(With a healer's skills, I can heal the body, but not the heart. But I am
a member of the clergy! I must heal the heart as well!)
それなら私に任せてください！ 聖職者としてあなたを必ず癒やします！<br>ご希望:
Then leave it to me! As a member of the clergy, I will definitely heal
you! Tell me anything you wish!
そ、そこまで言ってもらえるなら……。<br>実は、してほしいことがあるんです！:
Th-then, if you're willing to go that far... Actually, there is something
I'd like you to do!
